name: Norsemont Mining Inc.
description: Norsemont Mining Inc. is an advanced-stage mining company focused on the acquisition, exploration, and development of mineral properties. The company is primarily engaged in unlocking value from the Choquelimpie project, a past-producing gold-silver-copper mine located in northern Chile. With a significant mineral resource estimate and established infrastructure, including a 3,000 TPD mill and onsite facilities, Norsemont leverages its experienced leadership team to advance this high-potential asset. The company is headquartered in Vancouver, Canada, and is publicly traded on the Canadian Securities Exchange under the ticker symbol NOM.
